description:
Parent epic: V3 E7: Errors, debugging, and inspection

Source task 5/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Ensure inspection output is bounded and redacted.

Epic closure criteria:
- users can answer what happened in a turn without reading logs
- errors are normalized, readable, and safe to display
- debugging output is structured, bounded, and safe by default

comments.text: Made request inspection summaries bounded and display-safe by truncating prompt/message fields, redacting context previews, summarizing interrupts/errors, and sanitizing memory/compaction metadata. Added regression coverage for long prompts, raw responses, secrets, and failed/interrupted request summaries. Verified with focused debug/inspection/Kino tests plus full format, compile, test, docs, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E7: Ensure inspection output is bounded and redacted
